trained_from: conversation messages with deterministic weak labels; no external API

reminder: I am so glad that I have a day off today. I am not working tomorrow either. I am going to relax and take it easy.
I'm doing great! Thanks for asking! I'm just excited to start my senior year of high school next week.
Sounds good, I will send you a message later.
I'm going to go back to writing my story now. I'll talk to you later!
That's awesome! I'm happy for you! I just had knee surgery so I'm going to have lunch with my doctor tomorrow to check up on it.
emotional-support: I'm so sorry to hear that. Dogs are such wonderful companions.
I'm sorry to hear that. My family is everything to me.
Oh, I'm sorry to hear that.
I'm sorry to hear that. I hope you can find a way to be open with your family about who you are.
Awh, he's so cute! I love his name. I can't skate either, I'm too worried about falling and hurting myself
action-item: That sounds amazing! I've never been to Powell's Books before. I'm definitely going to have to check it out.
I'll have to try it sometime! What about your Impala?
You should definitely go! It's one of the most beautiful places I've ever been.
I've heard good things about that book! I'll have to check it out.
small-talk: That's great. Do you have any favorite places to visit in Portland?
Hello there, how are you doing today?
Reading is a great way to relax. I love to cook too! What is your favorite meal to make?
unknown: I'm doing pretty well. I'm excited to be moving to a new city soon!
I'm moving to Portland, Oregon. I'm going to be pursuing my culinary dreams there.
Really? That's so cool! Do you still live there?
Thanks for the recommendation! I'm sure I'll love it.
I'm doing great! I'm a fulltime student studying radiology at a local college and I also play in a band that my parents don't know about.
